tweets.full_text:
I’ve decreased my X usage by over 80% in the last month. I post my tweets and vanish.

I spread love, I educate and inform people on the latest Solana news/stats, and then I’m gone without looking back.

I might check a few DMs and comments from my loyal ones, and that’s it for the day.

I don’t consume anyone’s content. I don’t care about people’s negative opinions on the market or their useless political takes. I don’t care about going viral or engagement metrics. I don’t farm other tweets or care what people think.

I used to spend hours on this app trying to help everyone, replying to comments, DMs, engaging with as many accounts as possible. That’s not normal at all.

A lot of these influencers live horrible lives outside of this fake social presence. Crypto and social media can be poisonous for your mind and body. You have to limit your intake, regardless of payouts or engagement.

You don’t need to spend all your time here to make it. Just become more efficient. If you’re smart, you’ll limit your X usage.

Improve your life outside of X and crypto, and spend as little time here as possible. The less time you spend here, the happier you are, the more productive you are and ironically, the more you actually get out of this venemous app. Get the most output from the content you consume or the content you create and then vanish.

The algorithm is designed to keep you hooked and imprisoned in here. You must remain conscious of this.

Don’t forget the bigger picture. Freedom is not spending hours per day in this app.

Don’t let them distract you.

FTX collapsed
Alameda was liquidating
The SEC called SOL a security
Robinhood delisted it

The network had outages
CT called it dead

Fast forward today:

> 496B+ transactions processed
> $3.3T+ total trading volume
> $17.4B+ stablecoins onchain
> $1.7B+ tokenized RWAs
> Solana leads all chains in dApp revenue

Multiple spot SOL ETFs are live with $978.82M in total net inflows

Visa. PayPal. Stripe. Shopify. Western Union.

All building on Solana

And being able to trade almost any asset class onchain:

crypto
stocks
commodities
RWAs
real estate

From $8 and “Solana is dead” memes…

to one of the most active blockchains in the world

6 years of Solana

And more to come

2026:

Same asset
Different narrative

Clarity always wins

tweets.full_text:
6 Years of Solana: The Key Milestones 

> Mar 2018: @solana raises its first seed round (~$2M) 

> Jul 2019: Solana raises $20M in a Series A led by Multicoin Capital

> Mar 2020: Solana Mainnet Beta launches

> Apr 2020: SOL begins trading on crypto exchanges

> Jun 2020: Solana surpasses 1B total transactions

> Jun 2021: Solana raises $314M in a private token sale led by Andreessen Horowitz and Polychain

> Aug–Sep 2021: Solana in the top blockchains by market cap

> Nov 2021: SOL reaches an all-time high near $260.

> Jan 2022: Solana surpasses 50B total transactions

> Nov 2022: Google Cloud announces it is running a Solana validator

> Nov 2022: The FTX collapse causes SOL to drop ~50%

> Apr 2023: @solanamobile launches the Saga crypto smartphone

> Aug 2023: Solana Pay integrates with Shopify for USDC payments

> Mar 2024: Solana becomes the #1 blockchain by daily active addresses

> Mar 2025: Solana surpasses 400B transactions

> Aug 2025: Solana Mobile Seeker begins global shipping

> Oct 2025: Bitwise launches the first U.S. Solana ETF

> Jan 2026: The SKR token launches

> Mar 2026: Solana celebrates 6 years since the genesis block.

Photo throwback: me at Solana Breakpoint 2022 in Lisbon. How long have you been on Solana?

tweets.full_text:
Active Accelerators & Growth Programs for Solana Builders

1. @colosseum : Largest Solana hackathon-to-accelerator platform, top teams receive $250k funding, elite mentorship, and a powerful network. 

2. @incubator: Selective 3-month in-person program in NYC with hands-on mentorship directly from the Solana Labs team (no equity taken).
- Cohort 4 just launched, featuring @solomon_labs, @TradeNeutral, @fractalsdotfun, @0xspout, @CoralOS_ai.
- Cohort 5 applications open in May 2026.

3. @encodeclub x Solana Accelerator: 8-week online program offering 1-1 mentorship, workshops from Solana founders, and structured support for early-stage projects.

4. @XFounders_camp: High-intensity IRL bootcamp accelerator for Web3 & Solana projects, powered by Solana Foundation, with strong mentorship and investor access.

5. @SafePal x Solana Builder Growth Grant: $3M non-dilutive growth program offering hardware wallet sponsorships ($2M) and marketing exposure ($1M) to help Solana projects scale users, retention, and visibility. Applications open until Dec 31, 2026. 

6. @superteam: Strong community with grants and support to help you apply and scale on Solana.

7. @ycombinator (YC): Iconic top-tier accelerator providing $500k, now accepts funding in USDC on Solana. 

8. a16z Speedrun (@speedrun): Fast-paced 12-week program with up to $1M direct investment from a16z and hands-on mentorship for crypto/Solana startups.

9. @BoostVC: Crypto-native pre-seed accelerator that leads up to $500k for bold Solana and blockchain ideas.

10. @Techstars: Global accelerator network offering $220k with active Web3/crypto tracks that support Solana projects.

Which one are you targeting? Drop your project vertical below!

Solana Ecosystem Map 2026 for Founders.

@solana remains the strongest ecosystem to build on in crypto.

As the founder of @NOMADZxyz, I have spent years navigating the ecosystem end to end. From communities and hackathons to grants, accelerators, and fundraising, I have personally gone through each stage.

Based on that experience, here is a clear roadmap of the sources that deserve your attention in 2026.

1. Communities

Your starting point should be people. Surround yourself with founders, builders, and contributors who are already active in the ecosystem.

Start with:

➩ Global @superteam and local Superteams such as @SuperteamAE, @SuperteamDE, @SuperteamPOL, @SuperteamUKR, and others. 

This is also one of the strongest entry points to access experienced builders and early-stage funding through Instagrants (up to $10k grants).

➩ Solana-native communities such as @MonkeDAO, @islanddao, and @MadLads.

2. Hackathons

Hackathons allow you to test your product in real conditions, receive feedback, secure early funding, and build long-term relationships.

Programs worth your attention:

➩ @colosseum, including main (twice a year) and Eternal tracks.
➩ @solanamobile & @RadiantsDAO, focused on mobile apps for the Solana dApp Store.
➩ Solana hackathons by @Arcium and @magicblock with multiple additional bounties.
➩ Local hackathons organized by Superteams.

3. Grants (Non-Dilutive Funding)

At an early stage, raising large amounts of venture capital is rare. Start with smaller, strategic funding that validates your project and extends your runway.

Key sources:

➩ @SolanaFndn ($40k on average)
➩ @MetaplexFndn (based on DAO decision)
➩ @superteam (up to $10k)
➩ @solanamobile (up to $10k)
➩ @MonkeFoundry (up to $10k)

4. Accelerators

Accelerators provide structured support in product development, go-to-market strategy, fundraising preparation, and network access.

Leading programs:

➩ @colosseum 
➩ @OrangeDAOxyz 
➩ @incubator led by @solanalabs 
➩ @venture_launch
➩ @alliance 

5. Conferences and IRL Events

Physical presence accelerates trust and relationship building. Strategic conversations at events often lead to partnerships, funding, and distribution opportunities.

Events that consistently generate outcomes:

➩ Solana Breakpoint and Accelerate by @SolanaEvents.
➩ Regional events hosted by Superteams.
➩ Events organized by ecosystem companies such as @Backpack, @MeteoraAG and @JupiterExchange.

6. Bootcamps

Bootcamps provide focused education and deep ecosystem immersion. They strengthen both expertise and relationships within specific verticals.

Strong options include:

➩ @mtndao
➩ @venture_launch
➩ @sns Month at the @ns

This roadmap is based on personal experience. 

I have gone through almost all of these programs and understand the practical value they bring to founders.

Comment “Founder” and I will send you additional opportunities I am currently tracking inside the Solana ecosystem.

tweets.full_text:
i've been running overnight classic bid-ask consistently this month and the results have been clean. let me break down exactly how the strategy works from token selection all the way to exit.

the whole strategy lives or dies on token selection. this isn't a setup you can run on any random token and expect to wake up green.

token criteria:
- mcap 500k minimum
- token age at least 2 days old
- at least one credible KOL holding or has been seen in the token
- bubble maps looks clean, no suspicious clustering or wallet concentration

why 2 days minimum? tokens that are less than 48 hours old are still in price discovery. overnight on a day-1 token is gambling, not strategy. you want a token that has already shown it can survive a dip and still have buyers.

entry is after the token hits ath and dumps around -30%. that's the zone.

not at ath. not during the pump. after. when most people are panic selling or already moved on to the next ticker, that's when you open your position.

the setup is classic bid-ask, default range around -50% from entry price, single side sol only.

why not use wide range from ath? capital efficiency. a wide range from ath means most of your bins are sitting unused if price doesn't recover all the way back. 

default range from the -30% dip point means your capital is concentrated where the actual price action is happening. more fees.

exit is either on the pump back up or when profit hits 5%+, whichever comes first. if you wake up and you're already at green, close it.

the honest part: this strategy is entirely about which token you pick. the mechanics are simple, 

the range is standard, the entry zone is clear. but if you pick a token that just bleeds overnight with no recovery, no setup saves you.

get the token right and you'll almost always wake up on profit.

@MeteoraAG @met_lparmy

result.text:
woke up to $107 on rosie-sol. 6 hours overnight, classic bid-ask, clean exit. this is what happens when you enter at the right price.

i entered around -35% from ath. not at the top, not chasing the pump. by the time i opened the position the token had already taken most of its pain and had room to breathe.

that's the whole point of overnight positions. you're not trying to catch the move, you're set your range in an area where the price has already corrected and letting fees do the work while you sleep.

but here's the honest part about overnight. it's not just about the strategy, it's about when you wake up.

if you wake up and the position is red, it sets the tone for your entire day. you start second-guessing, you close early, you miss the recovery. 

that's why i never enter overnight or multidays at ath. entering after a meaningful dip means even if price moves against me overnight, i have a buffer. 

since i didn't like wide positions because of capital efficiency so i always wait for ze dip.

i've been more comfortable running multi-hours and multi-days strats this month than i've been in a long time.

$100 in a single night while sleeping. not a bad way to start the morning.

data.translation:
meridian. dlmm-agent demo. an AI agent that generates me $5-20 per day

so I built this purely to sharpen or push my vibecoding skills and my understanding of AI agents.

it can manage positions, find pools, check bundlers, or decide on good strategies for token volatility.

you guys just need to fill it with SOL and train it a few times. the results are pretty interesting, so far the hit rate is still 80-90%.

I built it using APIs from @MeteoraAG @lpagent_io @JupiterExchange and @OpenRouter for the agent.

still in beta test and for you all who have a hobby in vibecoding or want to tinker with dlmm with agents, you can DM to try it out.
